aka: Bringing Up Baby: The Natural History of a Mother's Love
trans_title: Bringing Up Baby: The Natural History of a Mother's Love
introduction: 讲述自然界中的动物母性，母亲如何在艰难的环境中将自己的孩子抚养长大。Natural World investigates the vital bond between animal mothers and their babies. The more we study animals, the more we realise just how emotional they are; all mothers are faced with tough choices as they struggle to bring up babies in a difficult and dangerous world, constantly balancing their own needs with those of their infants. Yet there are many ways to raise your brood, from the fish who looks after her young in her mouth to the extended childhoods of gorillas or orang-utans
